sentences.english: I have a pink piggy bank on my desk.
sentences.korean: 책상 위에 분홍 돼지 저금통이 있어요.

sentences.english: Every day I put my leftover coins in it.
My goal is to save enough money to buy a new skateboard.
sentences.korean: 새 스케이트보드를 사기 위해 충분히 모으는 게 목표예요.

sentences.english: I already have about twenty dollars.
I need thirty more dollars so I'll keep saving.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
